label: 🎯 Import
url: javascript:void((function(){try{console.log('[TW-DB][atak] click, url=',location.href);var ta=document.getElementById('simple_message');if(!ta){console.warn('[TW-DB][atak] #simple_message not found');UI.ErrorMessage('Nie znaleziono pola #simple_message',2000);return;}if(!window.twdA){console.log('[TW-DB][atak] step 1: copy');var txt=(ta.value||'');console.log('[TW-DB][atak] textarea length before=',txt.length);txt=txt.replace(/\\/g,'');ta.value=txt;console.log('[TW-DB][atak] textarea length after=',txt.length);ta.focus();ta.select();ta.setSelectionRange(0,999999);var onSuccess=function(){console.log('[TW-DB][atak] copied OK');UI.SuccessMessage('Skopiowano! Kliknij ponownie, aby przejść do bazy.',2000);};var onFail=function(err){console.warn('[TW-DB][atak] clipboard failed, fallback execCommand',err);try{document.execCommand('copy');console.log('[TW-DB][atak] execCommand copy OK');UI.SuccessMessage('Skopiowano! Kliknij ponownie, aby przejść do bazy.',2000);}catch(e){console.error('[TW-DB][atak] copy failed',e);UI.ErrorMessage('Błąd kopiowania',2000);}};if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(onSuccess,onFail);}else{onFail('navigator.clipboard unavailable');}window.twdA=true;}else{console.log('[TW-DB][atak] step 2: redirect to twdatabase');window.twdA=false;window.location.assign('https://twdatabase.online/Attacks');}}catch(err){console.error('[TW-DB][atak] exception',err);UI.ErrorMessage('Błąd: '+(err&&err.message?err.message:err),2500);}})());
